{{CargoOrgan
|name=Orbital Radar Eye
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10664
|idx=21
|description="Equipped with satellite tracking systems, this ocular implant processes extraterrestrial targeting data at lightspeed, rendering enemy stealth obsolete."
—Skynet Surveillance Log
|skill=Before round start, the radar captures the enemy's weakness, causing the next attack to deal DMG equal to 163%!
|hp=1338
|def=231
|atk=146
|rush=121
|gene1=Per purple or higher organ equipped, {race} RUSH +20
Purple or higher Organs equipped: 7/7
|gene2=Gene Simulation Power Checks -4%
|gene3=HIT +4%
|gene4=In Gene Sims, DMG +6%
|gene7=Gene Simulation Power Checks -4% (Awakened)
|}}
